title: HMM ablation decision artifact
description: OUTPUT-ONLY schema for the final runs/_hmm_decisions.json artifact (plan docs/planning/temporal_optimization_plan.md §2.2.1 d). Sister-file precedent: scripts/_r2_decision_schema.json. C3 iter-2 NEW-MAJOR 1 (2026-05-09): this schema is NOT used to validate raw per-cell metric inputs into apply_decision_rule — those are caught at dataclass construction (typed Python). The runner validates the SERIALIZED output against this schema BEFORE atomic-rename to runs/_hmm_decisions.json; any per-cell input failure that occurred upstream is already serialized into the decision='executor_error' notes field by the time this schema runs. Validation library: `jsonschema` (Draft-7), matching scripts/_r2_decision_schema.json's precedent.

deploy_via_tracker_artifact_exception.description: MUST be false unless decision == 'deploy' and the residual illegal-transition count was fully traceable to ByteTrack ID-switch / short-track noise. Validators should reject decision != 'deploy' with this flag true.

sensitivity_sweep.description: Plan §2.2 mandates exactly 3 rows over laplace_alpha ∈ {0.01, 0.1, 1.0}. C3 iter-3 NEW-MAJOR 2 (2026-05-09): the allOf+contains tuple guarantees one row per required alpha (combined with minItems/maxItems=3, this forces exactly one of each — Draft-7 has no minContains/maxContains). Exactly one row MUST set deploy_anchor=true; anchor-uniqueness remains a runner invariant since JSON Schema cannot express 'exactly one of array elements has property X = true' — b-stage runtime assertion required.

baseline_total_transitions.description: C3 iter-1 NEW-MAJOR 2: split from a single total_transitions field so denominator drift between baseline and candidate is grep-able / rejectable. The executor MUST assert baseline_total_transitions == candidate_total_transitions; mismatch surfaces as decision='executor_error'.

baseline_eligible_track_count.description: C3 iter-2 NEW-MAJOR 3: split from a single eligible_track_count field, same hazard as the transitions denominator. Same eligible-tracks rule on the same EVAL JSONL must produce identical track-set membership regardless of smoother. Executor asserts baseline_eligible_track_count == candidate_eligible_track_count; mismatch surfaces as decision='executor_error'.

baseline_total_track_count.description: C3 iter-2 NEW-MAJOR 3: split from a single total_track_count field. Executor asserts baseline_total_track_count == candidate_total_track_count; mismatch surfaces as decision='executor_error'.

ModeCell.description: C3 iter-2 NEW-MAJOR 2: extended to mirror DecisionResult so non-anchor sweep cells (e.g. an alpha=0.01 viterbi cell that landed on 'drop') retain the diagnostic fields needed to audit why. Without these, a non-headline cell becomes 'drop' or 'executor_error' with no trail. C3 iter-3 NEW-MAJOR 3 (2026-05-09): the if/then conditional below enforces deploy_via_tracker_artifact_exception=false whenever decision is not 'deploy', closing the audit-corruption hole where a non-deploy row could carry the deploy-exception flag.
